title: Collection Script Container
text: Collection Script Container Code container of an entity that is used for operations that handle the collection of entity occurrences (as opposed to individual occurrences). Description The Collection Script code container can contain: Constant declarations with container scope System triggers Interactive triggers Operations Entries Functions Before you can activate operations in the Collection Script container, you must first do the following: Ensure that there is a Collection Interface Name for the modeled entity. Enter ProcScript for your entity operations in the Collection Script container of the modeled entity. Compile the entity operation signatures for the entity. You can use the /ceo command line switch. To call an operation in this container, obtain a collection handle using $collhandle , then use this handle to invoke the desired operation. Related Links Operations Operations are ProcScript modules that are analogous to methods in other programming languages; they perform specific actions and can be activated by other ProcScript modules, and even by non-Uniface components. Occurrence Script Container Code container for defining occurrence-level operations and triggers. Public and Partner Operations Operations can be modified using the public or partner modifier. Public operations can be invoked from other components. Partner operations can only be invoked from the component in which they are defined. $collhandle Returns the handle of the specified entity. /ceo Compile entity collection operations and occurrence operations.
